channel.title: Emacs on Reion Wong's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Emacs on Reion Wong's Blog

item.title: Emacs Dired Mimeicon mode
item.description: This extension displays file and folder icons in dired mode. It uses mimetype as the displayed logo and follows the icon-theme-spec file naming convention, so you can use icon themes downloaded from the internet in your emacs.
